title: FatCat Gun PvP Pack
description: yep just another gun pvp modpack for ya all
body:
# Introduce
Refreshing tactical combat modpack perfect for friends to team up and play, this mod pack features an extensive arsenal of firearms, various attachments, a range of upgrades, ammo storage solutions and a customizable skin system. Engage in thrilling battles and experience epic adventures together.
<details>
<summary>Mod include from CursedForge</summary>

- [presencefootsteps](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/presence-footsteps-forge)
- [catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue)
- [inv sorter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-sorter)
- [configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)

</details>
